root.speaker: Serah Thornwell
root.text: Serah Thornwell. I lead Gaia's rites for this town. The inn is a roof over my head, and I am grateful, but I cannot run services wedged between supper and card games. I need a real altar outside: paths, a few stools, and the statue where people can pray without holding their breath from the kitchen smoke.

choices.text: You wanted to speak about a home.
You're on the shelf now. I thought you should know.
How is the altar working out for you?
You said you needed ground for Gaia.

serah_quest_altar.speaker: Serah Thornwell
serah_quest_altar.text: Stake a Gaia altar plot: paths, stools, and the statue where I can stand and folk can sit. Craft the token at your planning desk, place it with your staff, and pay the sign. When it is built, meet me at the statue and we will bless it properly.

serah_altar_accepted.speaker: Serah Thornwell
serah_altar_accepted.text: I will stay at the inn until the altar is built. Then find me at the statue and we will finish the blessing.

serah_building.speaker: Serah Thornwell
serah_building.text: When the altar stands, I will walk to the statue. Come find me there and we will call it done.

choices.text: I need to drop the quest.

serah_abandoned.speaker: Serah Thornwell
serah_abandoned.text: No hard feelings. If you still want an altar in town, ask again.

serah_done.speaker: Serah Thornwell
serah_done.text: The altar is finished. Thank you. I will keep the grounds tended and hold rites here as the town grows.

serah_house_offer.speaker: Serah Thornwell
serah_house_offer.text: The altar is for everyone. I still want a small house of my own, same as anyone else, so I am not living out of the inn hall forever. Build it from the usual token, then register me on the management block when it is up.

serah_house_accepted.speaker: Serah Thornwell
serah_house_accepted.text: When the house is up, put my name on the management block inside, then come find me. I want to hear you say it in person, not just read it off a list.

serah_house_remind.speaker: Serah Thornwell
serah_house_remind.text: These things take time. When the house is done, register me on the block, then come talk. That is when we are finished.

serah_house_finish.speaker: Serah Thornwell
serah_house_finish.text: Good. A roof that is actually mine.
